MedQ-Deg Benchmark

A comprehensive benchmark for medical image degradation recognition with 28 degradation types across 6 categories.

6
Categories
28
Degradation Types
4
Medical Datasets

Try selecting a different category

Category Details

Each category represents a distinct type of image degradation commonly found in medical imaging.

◐

Blur

Motion blur, Gaussian blur, defocus artifacts

4 types
Gaussian Blur Motion Blur Defocus Blur Box Blur
▥

Noise

Gaussian noise, salt & pepper, speckle noise

4 types
Gaussian Noise Salt & Pepper Speckle Noise Poisson Noise
⚠

Artifact

Motion artifacts, ring artifacts, aliasing

4 types
Motion Artifact Ring Artifact Aliasing Stripe Artifact
◑

Contrast

Low contrast, overexposure, underexposure

4 types
Low Contrast High Contrast Overexposure Underexposure
⤢

Compression

JPEG compression, block artifacts

4 types
JPEG Compression Block Artifact JPEG 2000 WebP Compression
⋯

Other

Other types of degradation

4 types
Haze Rain Frost Snow
M
MedQ-Deg

A multi-dimensional benchmark for medical image degradation recognition and beyond.
